meta.title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Benjamin Han: Snowflake: A SQL Engine to Talk to Your Data
meta.description:
Benjamin Han, Senior Software Engineer for ML at Snowflake, introduced AISQL, a paradigm that extends traditional SQL functionality with semantic awareness through a suite of LLM-powered SQL functions implemented on the Snowflake platform. 

At AI Dev 25 x NYC, Han shared that the goal of AISQL is to provide efficiency, ease of use, and trust benefits from the full Snowflake SQL platform to generative AI features. It integrates Large Language Models (LLMs) with the database by providing new primitive operators into the query language.

-------------

Join us at AI Dev 26 x San Francisco! Tickets: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
